title: refund — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families. Tenant-level for admin dashboards (refund lifecycle stream); pending-approvals for approver dashboards; per-customer for customer refund status live-view. Reverb (Laravel Reverb) is the default transport; the notifications module handles fanout.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.refunds
channels.description: Tenant-wide refund lifecycle stream. Sink for admin dashboards. Broadcasts every refund lifecycle event (requested / approval_required / approved / rejected / processing / succeeded / failed / cancelled / provider_error / provider_reconciled) at tenant level.
channels.notes: Payload trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Confidential fields (amount_cents, currency, provider_fee_reversal_cents) are omitted for readers without refunds.view-financials — the frontend re-fetches the full detail via HTTP when a user with financial permission drills in.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.refunds.pending-approvals
channels.description: Approval-workflow queue stream. Powers the real-time pending-approvals dashboard for approvers. Fires when a refund enters awaiting_approval + when it leaves (approved / rejected / cancelled). Enables live queue updates without polling.
channels.notes: Higher-signal-to-noise than the tenant.{id}.refunds channel because it only carries approval-workflow events. Approvers subscribe to this channel + not the full stream.

channels.name: customer.{customerId}.refunds
channels.description: Per-customer refund lifecycle stream. Powers the customer-facing refund status live-view (mobile app + web PWA). Broadcasts every state transition on refunds where the customer is the initiator or the customer_id on the parent payment.
channels.notes: Customer-scoped — payload includes the customer's own confidential fields (amount, currency) since the customer sees their own money. NEVER surfaces provider_fee_reversal_cents (competitive info) or admin-only fields (approver identity, rejection_reason internal notes).
